title: rubus densiflorus
intro: Rubus densiflorus, also known as the dense-flowered raspberry or Australian raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus densiflorus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Rubus densiflorus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
